D:\vscode\cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\main.dir/objects.a
D:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\main.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\main.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\g++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\main.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o main.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmain.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\main.dir\linklibs.rsp
